summary: I am only touching FileSystemLoader.__init__/get_source/list_templates to add fallback_searchpath; will keep edits minimal and localized so your path_transform changes to other classes and to __init__ signature don't conflict - please let me know if you also touch FileSystemLoader.__init__ signature

type: ANSWER
files: src/jinja2/loaders.py (all loader classes, adding path_transform kwarg)
summary: Acknowledged - I'm adding an optional path_transform callable param to BaseLoader subclasses (FileSystemLoader, PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader). For FileSystemLoader I'll append path_transform as the last kwarg in __init__ and apply it as the very first step in get_source (transform template name before pieces/fallback logic runs), keeping original name for TemplateNotFound. Will try to keep the diff additive so it merges cleanly with your fallback_searchpath work.
